summary: A modern, professional, mobile-friendly business website for AtoN Travels — a travel agency based in Jammu & Kashmir, India. The site features 7 pages (Home, About Us, Services, Tour Packages, Contact, Gallery, Testimonials), WhatsApp/Call buttons, inquiry form, Google Maps placeholder, responsive design, and SEO-friendly content.
architectural_notes: Multi-page website (7 pages): Home, About Us, Services, Tour Packages, Contact, Gallery, Testimonials
Target audience: tourists, families, couples, and groups; tone is friendly, trustworthy, professional
Business location: Jammu & Kashmir, India — content should reflect Kashmir/Leh Ladakh/All India tours
Real contact details: Phone 7006946979, Email arsalandezayker@gmail.com — use throughout site (footer, contact page, WhatsApp/Call buttons)

existing_features.title: Implement a multi-page React frontend with smooth client-side routing covering: Home, About Us, Services, Tour Packages, Contact, Gallery, and Testimonials pages. Include a persistent responsive navigation bar with the AtoN Travels logo/name and mobile hamburger menu, and a footer with business contact details and quick links.

Build the Home page with a full-width hero section displaying the hero image (hero-kashmir.dim_1920x1080.jpg), the tagline 'Your Journey, Our Responsibility', a sub-headline inviting visitors to explore Kashmir & beyond, and two CTA buttons: 'Explore Packages' and 'Contact Us'. Below the hero, include a quick-stats bar (years of experience, happy travelers, destinations) and a teaser section previewing services and featured packages.

Build the About Us page with a description of AtoN Travels as a trusted, locally-rooted travel agency based in Jammu & Kashmir, India. Include a mission statement, key trust indicators (licensed, experienced team, 24/7 support), and the about-team.dim_800x500.jpg image.

Build the Services page listing all five services with dedicated cards: Tour Packages (Kashmir, Leh Ladakh, All India), Taxi & Transport Services, Hotel Bookings, Flight Bookings, and Custom Travel Planning. Each card should have an icon, a title, a short description, and a 'Learn More / Inquire' CTA.

Build the Tour Packages page with at least 4 featured package cards. Include: Kashmir Valley Tour, Leh Ladakh Adventure, Vaishno Devi Pilgrimage, and All India Grand Tour. Each card should display the package image, title, duration, highlights, price indication, and a 'Book Now' CTA button that scrolls or links to the Contact/inquiry form.

Build the Contact page with: a WhatsApp button linking to 'https://wa.me/' (placeholder number), a 'Call Now' button with a tel: link, a contact inquiry form (fields: Name, Email, Phone, Travel Destination, Travel Dates, Message, Submit), a Google Maps embed placeholder (static image or iframe placeholder for Jammu & Kashmir location), and the business address/phone/email displayed.

Build the Gallery page displaying a responsive photo grid using the generated travel images (gallery-01 through gallery-06). Support a lightbox or modal view when clicking an image to see it enlarged.

Build the Testimonials page (and include a testimonials preview section on the Home page) with at least 5 customer review cards. Each card should show the reviewer's name, location, star rating (1–5), and review text. Use realistic placeholder reviews referencing Kashmir and Leh Ladakh trips.

Add floating sticky action buttons visible on all pages: a WhatsApp floating button (bottom-right, green) and a Call Now floating button (bottom-right, above WhatsApp). Both should be visible on mobile and desktop and use appropriate icons.

Apply a cohesive visual design theme throughout the site: warm earthy tones (deep teal, saffron/amber, off-white) evoking Kashmir's landscape. Use clean sans-serif typography, generous whitespace, subtle card shadows, and smooth hover transitions. Ensure fully mobile-responsive layouts across all pages using Tailwind CSS breakpoints.

Render the generated static images from frontend/public/assets/generated throughout the site: hero-kashmir.dim_1920x1080.jpg as the Home hero background, about-team.dim_800x500.jpg on the About page, package-kashmir.dim_600x400.jpg / package-ladakh.dim_600x400.jpg / package-vaishno.dim_600x400.jpg / package-india.dim_600x400.jpg on Tour Package cards, and gallery-01 through gallery-06 (each dim_800x600.jpg) in the Gallery page.

Replace all placeholder phone numbers and email addresses across the entire site with the real contact details: phone number 7006946979 and email arsalandezayker@gmail.com. This includes: the Contact page (displayed address block, Call Now button tel: link, WhatsApp button href), the Footer component (contact details section), the FloatingActionButtons component (Call Now tel: link and WhatsApp href using wa.me/917006946979), and the Navbar 'Call Now' CTA button.

new_feature_requests.summary: Home page with hero section and tagline 'Your Journey, Our Responsibility'
About Us page with trusted travel service description
Services page listing all 5 services (tour packages, taxi, hotel, flight, custom planning)
Tour Packages page with featured packages and call-to-action
Contact page with phone, WhatsApp button, contact form, and Google Maps placeholder
Floating WhatsApp and Call Now buttons site-wide
Mobile responsive design and SEO-friendly content throughout

Implement a backend inquiry form submission handler in the Motoko actor. Store inquiry submissions with fields: name, email, phone, destination, travelDates, message, and a timestamp. Expose a public function to submit an inquiry and an admin function to retrieve all inquiries.
Replace placeholder contact details with real phone number (7006946979) and email (arsalandezayker@gmail.com) across the entire site (Contact page, footer, WhatsApp/Call buttons, etc.)
